prompt: A hyper-realistic close-up photograph in a professional tailor's workshop. A beige fabric dress form mannequin has several random, jagged grey rocks, two bright yellow tennis balls, and a small blue metal can pinned to its torso. A tailor is carefully fitting a high-quality navy blue pinstripe suit jacket over the mannequin, with the fabric precisely bulging and stretching to perfectly contour around the irregular rocks and balls. Shallow depth of field, cinematic lighting, focus on the texture of the wool fabric straining over the obstructions.
metaphor: The suit (model) is tailored to random objects (noise) instead of the mannequin's shape (signal), demonstrating how a model loses utility by fitting perfectly to outliers.
